hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 regions, while mutating position 11 to hydrophobic residues (L/I/V) will improve steric discrimination against SSTR3/5, thereby increasing the selectivity margin.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving good ddG and selectivity but are failing structurally. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity may help generate designs that are both structurally valid and selective.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs.
Reduce the allowed clash score to enforce better structural quality and avoid steric clashes in the binding pocket.
